<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Biotiful – جمالك من الطبيعة</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Tajawal:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-light: #F0D083;
    --rose: #C2796E;
    --cream: #FAF5EE;
    --deep: #1A1208;
    --green: #3D6B4F;
    --terracotta: #B85C38;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body {
    background: var(--cream);
    font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif;
    color: var(--deep);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

/* HERO */
.hero {
position: relative;
text-align: center;
padding: 80px 20px 60px;
background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1A1208 0%, #2E1F0A 50%, #3D2B10 100%);
overflow: hidden;
}
.hero::before {
content: ‘’;
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background-image: url(“data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width=‘60’ height=‘60’ viewBox=‘0 0 60 60’ xmlns=‘http://www.w3.org/2000/svg’%3E%3Cg fill=‘none’ fill-rule=‘evenodd’%3E%3Cg fill=’%23C9A84C’ fill-opacity=‘0.06’%3E%3Cpath d=‘M36 34v-4h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2h-4zm0-30V0h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2V6h4V4h-4zM6 34v-4H4v4H0v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2H6zM6 4V0H4v4H0v2h4v4h2V6h4V4H6z’/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E”);
opacity: 0.4;
}
.hero-badge {
display: inline-block;
border: 1px solid var(–gold);
color: var(–gold);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: 4px;
text-transform: uppercase;
padding: 6px 20px;
margin-bottom: 24px;
animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
}
.hero h1 {
font-family: ‘Playfair Display’, serif;
font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
color: var(–cream);
line-height: 1;
font-style: italic;
animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.2s ease both;
}
.hero h1 span {
color: var(–gold);
display: block;
font-size: 0.55em;
font-style: normal;
letter-spacing: 3px;
margin-top: 8px;
}
.hero-sub {
color: rgba(250,245,238,0.65);
font-size: 1.1rem;
margin-top: 20px;
font-weight: 300;
animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.4s ease both;
}
.hero-divider {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
gap: 16px;
margin: 40px auto;
}
.hero-divider::before, .hero-divider::after {
content: ‘’;
width: 80px;
height: 1px;
background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(–gold));
}
.hero-divider::after { background: linear-gradient(to left, transparent, var(–gold)); }

.petal {
position: absolute;
border-radius: 50%;
background: var(–gold);
opacity: 0.3;
animation: float linear infinite;
}
@keyframes float {
0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
10% { opacity: 0.3; }
90% { opacity: 0.3; }
100% { transform: translateY(-600px) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
}
@keyframes fadeUp {
from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* FEATURES */
.features {
background: var(–deep);
padding: 50px 24px;
text-align: center;
}
.features-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
gap: 40px;
max-width: 900px;
margin: 0 auto;
}
.feature-item { color: var(–cream); }
.feature-icon { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 14px; display: block; }
.feature-title { font-family: ‘Playfair Display’, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(–gold); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.feature-text { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(250,245,238,0.55); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.6; }

/* SECTION */
.section {
position: relative;
z-index: 1;
max-width: 1200px;
margin: 0 auto;
padding: 60px 24px;
}
.section-title { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 50px; }
.section-title h2 { font-family: ‘Playfair Display’, serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); color: var(–deep); }
.section-title p { color: #7A6A52; margin-top: 10px; font-weight: 300; }
.gold-line { width: 60px; height: 2px; background: var(–gold); margin: 14px auto; }

/* PRODUCT GRID */
.products-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
gap: 28px;
}
.product-card {
background: white;
border-radius: 4px;
overflow: hidden;
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
transition: transform 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease;
position: relative;
}
.product-card:hover {
transform: translateY(-8px);
box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);
}
.product-card::after {
content: ‘’;
position: absolute;
bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
height: 3px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(–gold), var(–gold-light), var(–gold));
transform: scaleX(0);
transition: transform 0.4s ease;
}
.product-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

/* IMAGE — contain so full product is visible, white bg */
.product-img-wrap {
height: 280px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
background: #ffffff;
padding: 16px;
overflow: hidden;
}
.product-img-wrap img {
max-width: 100%;
max-height: 100%;
width: auto;
height: auto;
object-fit: contain;
transition: transform 0.5s ease;
display: block;
filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12));
}
.product-card:hover .product-img-wrap img {
transform: scale(1.07);
}

.product-info {
padding: 20px 24px 24px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}
.product-brand { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(–gold); margin-bottom: 6px; font-weight: 700; }
.product-name { font-family: ‘Playfair Display’, serif; font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(–deep); line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.product-desc { font-size: 0.84rem; color: #8A7A65; line-height: 1.6; font-weight: 300; }
.product-tag {
display: inline-block;
margin-top: 14px;
padding: 4px 12px;
font-size: 10px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase;
border: 1px solid;
border-radius: 50px;
font-weight: 700;
}
.cat-hair { background: rgba(61,107,79,0.08); border-color: var(–green); color: var(–green); }
.cat-skin { background: rgba(194,121,110,0.08); border-color: var(–rose); color: var(–rose); }
.cat-body { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border-color: var(–gold); color: #8A6A20; }
.cat-food { background: rgba(184,92,56,0.08); border-color: var(–terracotta); color: var(–terracotta); }

/* CTA */
.cta-banner {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–gold) 0%, #A8862E 50%, var(–gold-light) 100%);
padding: 60px 24px;
text-align: center;
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
}
.cta-banner h2 { font-family: ‘Playfair Display’, serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem); color: white; font-style: italic; }
.cta-banner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin: 16px auto; max-width: 500px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; }
.cta-btn {
display: inline-block;
margin-top: 24px;
padding: 14px 44px;
background: var(–deep);
color: var(–gold);
font-size: 12px;
letter-spacing: 3px;
text-transform: uppercase;
font-weight: 700;
border: none;
cursor: pointer;
transition: all 0.3s ease;
font-family: ‘Tajawal’, sans-serif;
}
.cta-btn:hover { background: white; color: var(–deep); transform: scale(1.04); }

footer {
background: var(–deep);
padding: 30px 24px;
text-align: center;
color: rgba(250,245,238,0.4);
font-size: 0.8rem;
letter-spacing: 2px;
}
footer span { color: var(–gold); }

.reveal {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateY(40px);
transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
}
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
</style>

</head>
<body>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="petal" style="left:10%;bottom:0;animation-duration:8s;width:4px;height:4px;"></div>
  <div class="petal" style="left:25%;bottom:0;animation-duration:12s;animation-delay:2s;width:6px;height:6px;background:#C2796E"></div>
  <div class="petal" style="left:50%;bottom:0;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:1s;width:5px;height:5px;"></div>
  <div class="petal" style="left:70%;bottom:0;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:3s;width:3px;height:3px;background:#3D6B4F"></div>
  <div class="petal" style="left:85%;bottom:0;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:1.5s;width:7px;height:7px;"></div>
  <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
    <div class="hero-badge">✦ طبيعي · أصيل · مغربي ✦</div>
    <h1>Biotiful<span>جمالك من الطبيعة</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">منتجات طبيعية 100% · من قلب المغرب إلى يديكِ</p>
    <div class="hero-divider"><span style="color:var(--gold)">❋</span></div>
    <p style="color:rgba(240,208,131,0.8);font-size:0.95rem;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;font-weight:300;">
      عناية فاخرة بمكونات نقية — زيت أركان، صبار، تين شوكي، وورد الڭلعة
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="features">
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feature-item reveal"><span class="feature-icon">🌿</span><div class="feature-title">100% طبيعي</div><div class="feature-text">مكونات نقية بدون مواد كيميائية ضارة</div></div>
    <div class="feature-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s"><span class="feature-icon">🇲🇦</span><div class="feature-title">صنع في المغرب</div><div class="feature-text">وصفات أصيلة توارثناها جيلاً بعد جيل</div></div>
    <div class="feature-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s"><span class="feature-icon">✨</span><div class="feature-title">Sans Paraben</div><div class="feature-text">آمن لجميع أنواع البشرة والشعر</div></div>
    <div class="feature-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s"><span class="feature-icon">🎁</span><div class="feature-title">هدية مثالية</div><div class="feature-text">تغليف فاخر يليق بكل مناسبة</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title reveal">
    <h2>مجموعتنا الكاملة</h2>
    <div class="gold-line"></div>
    <p>اختاري ما يناسب جمالك — عناية شاملة من رأسك إلى أخمص قدميكِ</p>
  </div>

  <div class="products-grid">

```
<div class="product-card reveal">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Honey & Mixed Nuts">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Artisanal</div>
    <div class="product-name">Honey & Mixed Nuts</div>
    <div class="product-desc">مزيج فاخر من العسل والمكسرات المختارة — لذيذ ومغذٍّ</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-food">غذاء طبيعي</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gommage Figue de Barbarie">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Gommage Figue de Barbarie</div>
    <div class="product-desc">مقشر بتين شوكي لتجديد البشرة وإزالة الخلايا الميتة — 150g</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-skin">العناية بالبشرة</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.15s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Savon Argan">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Savon à l'Huile d'Argan</div>
    <div class="product-desc">صابون حرفي طبيعي بزيت أركان — للوجه والجسم، sans paraben</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-body">العناية بالجسم</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Démêleur Aloe Vera">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Démêleur Aloe Vera</div>
    <div class="product-desc">مرطب ومسهل للشعر بالصبار — 200ml، لطيف وطبيعي</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-hair">العناية بالشعر</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.25s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Crème Anti Cerne">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Crème Anti Cerne</div>
    <div class="product-desc">كريم مضاد للهالات السوداء بخلاصة تين شوكي — ترطيب عميق وغني بالكولاجين</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-skin">العناية بالبشرة</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Huile d'Argan">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Huile d'Argan Cosmétique</div>
    <div class="product-desc">زيت أركان متعدد الاستخدامات — للوجه والجسم والشعر، 100ml عضوي</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-body">متعدد الاستخدام</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.35s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Crème Rose">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Assila · ڭلعة مڭونة</div>
    <div class="product-name">Crème Hydratante à la Rose</div>
    <div class="product-desc">كريم مرطب بروح الورد الأصيل من ڭلعة مڭونة — إحساس بالانتعاش والنضارة</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-skin">العناية بالبشرة</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.4s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Huile Anti-Chute">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Orghino · Coopérative Agricole</div>
    <div class="product-name">Huile Anti-Chute 14 Oils</div>
    <div class="product-desc">مزيج 14 زيت طبيعي لمنع تساقط الشعر وتقويته — 100ml</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-hair">العناية بالشعر</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.45s">
  <div class="product-img-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shampoo Argan">
  </div>
  <div class="product-info">
    <div class="product-brand">Biotiful</div>
    <div class="product-name">Shampoo à l'Huile d'Argan</div>
    <div class="product-desc">شامبو بزيت أركان، بدون سولفات — 200ml، لطيف وطبيعي</div>
    <span class="product-tag cat-hair">العناية بالشعر</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<div class="cta-banner">
  <h2>اطلبي مجموعتك اليوم</h2>
  <p>تغليف هدية فاخر ومجاني لكل طلب — احتفلي بجمالك الطبيعي</p>
  <button class="cta-btn">تواصلي معنا الآن ✦</button>
</div>

<footer>
  <span>✦ Biotiful</span> · منتجات طبيعية أصيلة من المغرب · <span>100% Naturel</span>
</footer>

<script>
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  reveals.forEach(r => obs.observe(r));
</script>

</body>
</html>
